title: Soup Servings
hints: Notice that n is up to 10^9, so simulation or direct DP is impossible. Look for a pattern in small n values.
Use dynamic programming with memoization on the remaining amounts of A and B, scaling n down by 25 to reduce state space.
For large n, the probability converges to 1 very quickly. Find the threshold n where the answer is indistinguishable from 1.0.
